entities.name: Over-automation risk
entities.context: Risk of founders over-investing in internal tools (like invoicing automation) before having enough customers to justify it

entities.name: Data ownership
entities.context: Differentiator where VCs and employers prefer owning talent data rather than renting access from intermediaries

entities.name: Acquisition optics
entities.context: Quality and structure of revenue (annual, recurring, diversified) is as important as top-line numbers when buyers evaluate companies

entities.name: Founder mental load
entities.context: Emotional resilience for handling layoffs, sales rejection, and ambiguous hiring calls is central to survival

entities.name: Recurring revenue
entities.context: Type of revenue structure valued in acquisition evaluation

entities.name: Peer communities
entities.context: Support mechanism founders and others rely on to stay effective

relationships.context: Both are challenges founders face in building companies
Recurring revenue is a key component of favorable acquisition optics
Founders rely on peer communities to manage emotional resilience
Both relate to how companies build defensible, valuable assets
